rationale: The citing paper explicitly positions itself as extending prior macro-level optimal-control advertising allocation work to individual-level microtargeting, and the cited paper is a brand-level dynamic advertising budget model grounded in analytics/heuristics and dual-control logic—making it a plausible direct theory/mechanism predecessor rather than a generic mention.
